scores.correctness_notes: Response correctly demonstrates the IngressPerAppRequirer pattern with accurate class names, events, and properties. The gold standard only covers data schema; the agent correctly extends to the Python API layer which does exist in the traefik-k8s library.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, strip_prefix, event.url, and self.ingress.url all exist in the traefik-k8s library
